mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO content_reply ( title, body, writer, user_id, created_at, content_id, file_path, gno, ono, nested, secret, reply_status, vendor_id ) VALUES( #{title}, #{body}, #{writer}, #{user_id}, NOW(), #{content_id}, #{file_path}, #{gno}, #{ono}, #{nested}, #{secret}, 0, #{vendor_id} )
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()

INSERT INTO content_reply( body, writer, user_id, created_at, content_id, file_path, gno, ono, nested, reply_status ) VALUES( #{body}, #{writer}, #{user_id}, NOW(), #{content_id}, #{file_path}, #{gno}, #{ono} + 1, #{nested} + 1, 1 )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM content_reply WHERE content_id=#{content_id} AND ono=0
SELECT * FROM content_reply WHERE gno = (SELECT gno FROM content_reply WHERE creply_id = #{creply_id}) ORDER BY nested ASC, ono ASC
SELECT * FROM content_reply WHERE content_id = #{content_id} ORDER BY gno DESC, ono ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM content_reply WHERE gno = #{gno} AND ono > 0
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM content_reply WHERE gno=#{gno} AND ono>0
